channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2040] Test failure on test suite mds-survey, subtest test_1
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2f30564a-08f5-11e2-b313-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_1 failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

Should add version check to skip mds-survey in interop with 2.1<->2.3

02:23:01:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == mds-survey test 1: Metadata survey with zero-stripe == 02:22:55 (1348737775)
02:23:01:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl dl
02:23:01:Lustre: Echo OBD driver; http://www.lustre.org/
02:23:01:LustreError: 19640:0:(mdt_handler.c:5073:mdt_obd_connect()) ASSERTION( env != ((void *)0) ) failed: 
02:23:01:LustreError: 19640:0:(mdt_handler.c:5073:mdt_obd_connect()) LBUG
02:23:01:Pid: 19640, comm: lctl
02:23:01:
02:23:01:Call Trace:
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0bd77f5>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0bd7e07>] lbug_with_loc+0x47/0xb0 [libcfs]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa09f63c6>] mdt_obd_connect+0x386/0x440 [mdt]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa090a9fc>] echo_device_alloc+0xa1c/0x14a0 [obdecho]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0498a67>] obd_setup+0x1d7/0x2f0 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0484eeb>] ? class_new_export+0x72b/0x960 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0498d88>] class_setup+0x208/0x890 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa04a08bc>] class_process_config+0xbfc/0x1be0 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa047c49b>] class_handle_ioctl+0x3cb/0x1ed0 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8113ff34>] ? handle_mm_fault+0x1e4/0x2b0
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa04692ab>] obd_class_ioctl+0x4b/0x190 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8118dff2>] vfs_ioctl+0x22/0xa0
02:23:01: [<ffffffff81039678>] ? pvclock_clocksource_read+0x58/0xd0
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8118e194>] do_vfs_ioctl+0x84/0x580
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8103876c>] ? kvm_clock_read+0x1c/0x20
02:23:01: [<ffffffff81038779>] ? kvm_clock_get_cycles+0x9/0x10
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8109c9b0>] ? getnstimeofday+0x60/0xf0
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8118e711>] sys_ioctl+0x81/0xa0
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8100b0f2>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
02:23:01:
02:23:01:Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG
02:23:01:Pid: 19640, comm: lctl Not tainted 2.6.32-279.2.1.el6_lustre.gc46c389.x86_64 #1
02:23:01:Call Trace:
02:23:01: [<ffffffff814fd57a>] ? panic+0xa0/0x168
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0bd7e5b>] ? lbug_with_loc+0x9b/0xb0 [libcfs]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa09f63c6>] ? mdt_obd_connect+0x386/0x440 [mdt]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa090a9fc>] ? echo_device_alloc+0xa1c/0x14a0 [obdecho]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0498a67>] ? obd_setup+0x1d7/0x2f0 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0484eeb>] ? class_new_export+0x72b/0x960 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa0498d88>] ? class_setup+0x208/0x890 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa04a08bc>] ? class_process_config+0xbfc/0x1be0 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa047c49b>] ? class_handle_ioctl+0x3cb/0x1ed0 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8113ff34>] ? handle_mm_fault+0x1e4/0x2b0
02:23:01: [<ffffffffa04692ab>] ? obd_class_ioctl+0x4b/0x190 [obdclass]
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8118dff2>] ? vfs_ioctl+0x22/0xa0
02:23:01: [<ffffffff81039678>] ? pvclock_clocksource_read+0x58/0xd0
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8118e194>] ? do_vfs_ioctl+0x84/0x580
02:23:01: [<ffffffff8103876c>] ? kvm_clock_read+0x1c/0x20
02:23:01: [<ffffffff81038779>] ? kvm_clock_get_cycles+0x9/0x10

02:23:01: [<ffffffff8100b0f2>] ? system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
item.summary: Test failure on test suite mds-survey, subtest test_1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Yes, I believe this should be closed.
Since Change, 4124 has landed to master, can this ticket be closed?

Bob

Could you please take care of this one? We'll still be supporting interop with 2.1.x for Lustre 2.4 so this is needed for master and perhaps we can add the fix to b2_3 if we need an RC2 for 2.3

Thanks

Peter
